name: carrecog
description: AI-Powered Indian Car Recognition Web Application

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "FRONTEND,BACKEND,AI" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:ai"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../ai-model && pip install -r requirements.txt
